Consultor.ProductQuery: SELECT TOP 1 p.Descrip, p.{PriceColumn} AS Precio, (SELECT Monto FROM sataxprd WHERE CodProd = p.CodProd) AS Monto FROM saprod p INNER JOIN sacodbar b ON b.CodProd = p.CodProd WHERE p.CodProd = @code OR b.CodAlte = @code
Consultor._MySQL_query_ejemplo: SELECT p.Descrip, p.{PriceColumn} AS Precio, (SELECT Monto FROM sataxprd WHERE CodProd = p.CodProd) AS Monto FROM saprod p INNER JOIN sacodbar b ON b.CodProd = p.CodProd WHERE p.CodProd = @code OR b.CodAlte = @code LIMIT 1
Consultor._Firebird_query_ejemplo: SELECT FIRST 1 p.Descrip, p.{PriceColumn} AS Precio, (SELECT Monto FROM sataxprd WHERE CodProd = p.CodProd) AS Monto FROM saprod p INNER JOIN sacodbar b ON b.CodProd = p.CodProd WHERE p.CodProd = @code OR b.CodAlte = @code
Consultor._PostgreSQL_query_ejemplo: SELECT p.Descrip, p.{PriceColumn} AS Precio, (SELECT Monto FROM sataxprd WHERE CodProd = p.CodProd) AS Monto FROM saprod p INNER JOIN sacodbar b ON b.CodProd = p.CodProd WHERE p.CodProd = @code OR b.CodAlte = @code LIMIT 1
